title: tridax procumbens var. canescens
intro: Tridax procumbens var. canescens, also known as the 'false dandelion', is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tridax procumbens var. canescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
